title: CAMERA REVEAL — Papa shows new video camera
prompt: Medium three-shot in the cozy anniversary living room — twinkling fairy lights, beige sectional couch, coffee table in foreground. @Papa center holding a small ribbon-wrapped gift box, hands LIFT the box, fingers UNTIE the ribbon. Inside the box, a sleek black-and-silver mirrorless VIDEO CAMERA with a soft cream lens cap. @Sara at his left, mouth GASPS open. @Eva at his right, eyes WIDEN huge. Right hand POINTS at the camera. Sara (excited): "It's a CAMERA!" Mouth SMILES proud from center. Papa: "She LOVES making videos and helping people work out the right way. This is for her to share more with the world."
